violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Ham sliced yesterday was not date marked. -Salad item containers were not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cloth used as shelf liner below stored coffee cups at front counter and below single use plates in kitchen.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some food spill/debris at kitchen refrigerator shleves and drwaers. -Frost build up at interior surfaces of tater tot chest freezer.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Large gap below screen door to kitchen. *Corrected on site, placed draft stopper below door.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. -Sani sink found at 100ppm+ Chlorine solution. -Made new sink solution of 50ppm Chlorine while on-site.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Evidence of animal damage to bag of macaroni in dry storage. *Staff stated a cat had gotten in previously and was live trapped soon after discovery. *Bag of macaroni disposed of while on-site.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
